name: SleeperBot
description: Summit Bullion is a U.S. based precious metals company building an all in one platform that connects fully backed physical gold to a transparent tokenized ecosystem on chain. We operate as a real bullion dealer first, sourcing and shipping physical gold and silver with lean retail margins, and then extend that same inventory and pricing discipline into a gold backed token and liquidity pool. The project uses a dedicated SPV and vaulting structure, clear protocol level fees, and public documentation so both retail users and institutions can verify how metal is held, how tokens are created and redeemed, and how value flows between the physical and digital sides of the business.
